text: So far this month Hezbullah killed 7 Israeli soldiers and contractors in south Lebanon. 4 during the ceasefire using various suicide drones.
text_zh: 本月迄今，真主党在黎巴嫩南部杀死了7名以色列士兵和承包商。其中4人在停火期间被各种自杀式无人机杀死。

text: The Justice Department has indicted former FBI Director James Comey again, this time over a social media post showing seashells arranged as “86 47,” which critics interpreted as a threat against Trump. Source: CNN
text_zh: 美国司法部再次起诉前联邦调查局局长詹姆斯·科米，这次是因为他发布了一张社交媒体帖子，图中贝壳排列成“86 47”，批评者将其解读为对特朗普的威胁。来源：CNN

text: CBS News fired its London bureau chief Claire Day after reported clashes with editor-in-chief Bari Weiss over Middle East coverage. Day, a longtime CBS journalist, had pushed for more balanced reporting on Gaza and Iran, while Weiss—known for strong pro-Israel views—reportedly disagreed. Source: Haaretz
text_zh: 据报道，在与总编辑巴里·韦斯就中东报道发生冲突后，哥伦比亚广播公司（CBS）新闻部解雇了其伦敦分社社长克莱尔·戴。戴是一位资深的CBS记者，曾推动对加沙和伊朗进行更平衡的报道，而以强硬亲以色列观点著称的韦斯据称对此表示反对。来源：国土报

text: ❗️ Hezbullah successfully killed an Israeli contractor working on demolishing civilian houses in Bint Jbeil He was razing our homes and towns. His son was reportedly injured too. Israel employs hundreds of Israeli setters in Gaza and Lebanon and pays them for each house they destroy.
text_zh: ❗️ 真主党成功击毙了一名正在宾特朱拜勒拆毁平民房屋的以色列承包商。他当时正在夷平我们的家园和城镇。据报道，他的儿子也受伤了。以色列在加沙和黎巴嫩雇佣了数百名以色列定居者，并为他们摧毁的每一栋房屋支付报酬。

text: Kim Jong Un praised soldiers who took their own lives to avoid capture while fighting in Russia’s Kursk region. He described them as “heroes” who “unhesitatingly chose the path of self-destruction and suicide to defend great honor.” Source: Reuters
text_zh: 金正恩赞扬了在俄罗斯库尔斯克地区作战时为避免被俘而自杀的士兵。他称他们为“英雄”，称他们“毫不犹豫地选择了自我毁灭和自杀的道路，以捍卫伟大的荣誉”。来源：路透社

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "China's independent "teapot" refineries in Shandong—accounting for roughly a quarter of national capacity—face margin squeezes or outright shutdowns. The effective cost for Beijing has risen despite the $15‑20 discount, because the supply chain itself is being dismantled: vessels seized, ship‑to‑ship networks disrupted. This is not just a price shock; it's a systematic rupture." ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 The U.S. Treasury's Office of Foreign Assets Control has warned financial institutions of sanctions risks linked to Chinese independent "teapot" oil refineries, primarily in Shandong Province, which account for the majority of China's imports of Iranian crude — purchases that represent approximately 90 percent of Iran's total oil exports. Treasury said some teapot refineries have used the U.S. financial system for dollar-denominated transactions, and warned that common evasion tactics include front companies in Asia and the UAE, a shadow fleet, ship-to-ship transfers and falsified documentation. Financial institutions were urged to conduct enhanced due diligence on transactions involving China-based refineries. The department said it is prepared to deploy secondary sanctions against foreign financial institutions that continue to facilitate Iran's oil trade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“中国山东的独立‘茶壶’炼油厂——约占全国产能的四分之一——正面临利润空间被压缩或直接关闭的困境。尽管有15-20美元的折扣，但北京的实际成本却在上升，因为供应链本身正在被瓦解：船只被扣押，船对船网络被破坏。这不仅仅是价格冲击，而是系统性的破裂。” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 美国财政部海外资产控制办公室已警告金融机构，与中国独立“茶壶”炼油厂（主要位于山东省）相关的制裁风险。这些炼油厂占中国伊朗原油进口的大部分——这些采购约占伊朗石油出口总额的90%。财政部表示，一些茶壶炼油厂利用美国金融系统进行美元计价交易，并警告称，常见的规避策略包括在亚洲和阿联酋设立空壳公司、影子船队、船对船转运和伪造文件。金融机构被敦促对涉及中国炼油厂的交易进行加强尽职调查。该部门表示，准备对继续协助伊朗石油贸易的外国金融机构实施二级制裁。 @wfwitness

text: The latest attack in Jebsheet caused civilian casualties. Bloody day This is the ceasefire the government met the Israelis over? Just to remind you that the Lebanon they care about starts north of Khaldeh and ends south of Akkar and Tripoli
text_zh: 杰布谢特（Jebsheet）的最新袭击造成了平民伤亡。血腥的一天。这就是政府与以色列人达成的停火协议吗？提醒一下，他们关心的黎巴嫩是从哈尔代（Khaldeh）以北开始，到阿卡（Akkar）和的黎波里（Tripoli）以南结束。

text: 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 What a bizarre moment. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 多么离奇的时刻。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇩🇪 Trump is now angry at Germany's Merz. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇩🇪 特朗普现在对德国的默茨感到愤怒。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🥀 Lebanese Civil Defense martyrs who were killed in an Israeli strike in Majdal Zoun: Hussein Sati, Hadi Daher, and Hussein Ghadbouni More than 100+ civil defense members were killed during the war, but they don't matter because they are from Haya' or Al-Risala
text_zh: 🥀 在马吉达尔祖恩（Majdal Zoun）的以色列空袭中丧生的黎巴嫩民防烈士：侯赛因·萨蒂（Hussein Sati）、哈迪·达赫（Hadi Daher）和侯赛因·加德布尼（Hussein Ghadbouni）。战争期间有超过100名民防人员丧生，但他们并不重要，因为他们来自阿迈勒运动（Haya'）或黎巴嫩真主党（Al-Risala）。

text: More than 50 Lebanese civilians have been killed since the ceasefire started and the Lebanese president only condemned the death of tonight's 3 civil defense workers. PLEASE UNDERSTAND HE DOES NOT CARE ABOUT SOUTH LEBANON NOR THE SHIA. He does not see you as Lebanese and your death is acceptable and cheaper than dirt
text_zh: 自停火开始以来，已有超过50名黎巴嫩平民丧生，而黎巴嫩总统仅谴责了今晚3名民防人员的死亡。请明白，他根本不在乎黎巴嫩南部，也不在乎什叶派。他并不把你视为黎巴嫩人，你的死亡是可以接受的，而且比尘土还廉价。

text: Open Source Intel Russian President Putin: "We know that both the Kyiv regime and its partners have resorted to openly terrorist methods. The reasons are obvious, they are clear to everyone. The enemy is unable to stop the advance of our troops, our men, along the line of contact. Every day, they are losing territory." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）俄罗斯总统普京：“我们知道基辅政权及其伙伴已经诉诸公开的恐怖主义手段。原因显而易见，每个人都清楚。敌人无法阻止我们的军队、我们的人员在接触线上的推进。他们每天都在失去领土。” 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from U.S. State Department Deputy Spokesperson Tommy Pigott and earlier reporting by the Bulwark, the U.S. is set to release limited numbers of new U.S. passports with the visage of U.S. President Donald J. Trump to commemorate the United States’ 250th anniversary. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据美国国务院副发言人汤米·皮戈特（Tommy Pigott）发布的消息以及《Bulwark》早先的报道，美国计划发行少量印有美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普头像的新版美国护照，以纪念美国建国250周年。 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 according to CENTCOM Earlier today in the Arabian Sea, U.S. Marines from the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit boarded the commercial vessel M/V Blue Star III, which was suspected of attempting to reach Iran in violation of the U.S. blockade. ▪️ After conducting an inspection and confirming that the ship was not planning to call at an Iranian port, U.S. forces allowed the vessel to continue its voyage. Video is half AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：❗️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 据中央司令部（CENTCOM）消息，今天早些时候在阿拉伯海，美国海军陆战队第31远征部队登上了商船“蓝星三号”（M/V Blue Star III），该船被怀疑试图违反美国封锁前往伊朗。▪️ 在进行检查并确认该船没有计划停靠伊朗港口后，美军允许该船继续航行。视频有一半是AI生成的。 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT OSINTdefender RT @DefenseBulletin : Context: UAE OPEC OPEC, which is dominated by Saudi Arabia, has suffered from infighting due to the competing strategic outlooks of Saudi Arabia and the UAE, as both have increasingly been at loggerheads as they attempt to implement their respective strategic outlooks in the region and across the globe. More importantly, the move will allow the UAE to ramp up and down oil output as they see fit, a key Saudi-UAE point of contention within the framework. According to the United Arab Emirates (UAE) Ministry of Energy and Infrastructure, the UAE is planning to withdraw from the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries (OPEC) and the OPEC+ frameworks, effective May 1. Per the release, the “decision comes following a thorough review of the United Arab Emirates' production policy and its current and future capabilities, and in light of what national interests require and the state's commitment to contributing effectively to meeting the market's pressing needs.” - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT OSINTdefender 转发 @DefenseBulletin：背景：阿联酋与欧佩克（OPEC）。以沙特阿拉伯为主导的欧佩克因沙特和阿联酋竞争性的战略前景而陷入内斗，随着两国试图在地区和全球范围内实施各自的战略前景，双方的矛盾日益加剧。更重要的是，此举将允许阿联酋根据自身意愿增加或减少石油产量，这是该框架内沙特与阿联酋之间的一个关键争论点。根据阿拉伯联合酋长国（UAE）能源和基础设施部的消息，阿联酋计划退出石油输出国组织（OPEC）和欧佩克+（OPEC+）框架，自5月1日起生效。根据发布的消息，“这一决定是在对阿联酋的生产政策及其当前和未来能力进行彻底审查后，并考虑到国家利益的需求以及国家致力于为有效满足市场紧迫需求做出贡献而做出的。” - OSINTdefender 推文

text: Open Source Intel Getting reports that the financial situation in Iran is getting really ugly. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）收到报告称，伊朗的财政状况正变得非常糟糕。 推文

text: Open Source Intel In southern Lebanon. Ceasefire going great. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049202201436770694/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Pakistan’s Commerce Ministry has opened 6 official land transit corridors for cargo heading to Iran under a new 2026 order. The routes link Karachi, Port Qasim and Gwadar with the Gabd and Taftan border crossings into Iran through multiple roads in Balochistan. More than 3,000 containers bound for Iran are reportedly stuck at Karachi Port after vessels scheduled to collect them failed to arrive, and are now being shifted overland by truck. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）巴基斯坦商务部根据2026年的一项新命令，为前往伊朗的货物开通了6条官方陆路过境走廊。这些路线将卡拉奇、卡西姆港和瓜达尔港与加布德（Gabd）和塔夫坦（Taftan）边境口岸连接起来，穿过俾路支省的多条道路。据报道，由于预定接货的船只未能抵达，超过3000个运往伊朗的集装箱滞留在卡拉奇港，目前正通过卡车进行陆路转运。 推文

text: Open Source Intel US ambassador to Ukraine to leave over differences with Donald Trump https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049201010162155968/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）美国驻乌克兰大使因与唐纳德·特朗普存在分歧而离职 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049201010162155968/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender The U.S. Department of the Treasury has announced additional sanctions against Iranian banking networks that fund the Iranian regime and the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps (IRGC). Per the release, sanctions targeted private companies known as “Rahbars” that help blacklisted banks employ shadow banking networks to help fund the regime, Iran’s Armed Forces General Staff (AFGS), Iran’s National Iranian Oil Company (NIOC), and the IRGC. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国财政部宣布对资助伊朗政权和伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）的伊朗银行网络实施额外制裁。根据发布的消息，制裁目标是被称为“Rahbars”的私营公司，这些公司帮助被列入黑名单的银行利用影子银行网络为伊朗政权、伊朗武装部队总参谋部（AFGS）、伊朗国家石油公司（NIOC）和伊斯兰革命卫队提供资金。 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 A video has emerged in Times Square, Newyork illuminated with the Lebanese and Israeli flags, and referring to Hezbollah flag as the obstacle preventing peace between the two countries. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 纽约时代广场出现了一段视频，屏幕上亮起了黎巴嫩和以色列的国旗，并将真主党旗帜称为阻碍两国和平的障碍。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 US economic sanctions kill hundreds of thousands of people annually. According to the Libertarian Institute: Unilateral US sanctions kill about 564,000 people across the globe annually, with 51% of these deaths being children under five years old. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 美国经济制裁每年导致数十万人死亡。据自由意志主义研究所（Libertarian Institute）称：美国单方面制裁每年在全球导致约564,000人死亡，其中51%的死者是五岁以下的儿童。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israeli Police Commissioner Danny Levy strongly condemned the breach of the Military Police chief’s home in Ashkelon, calling it a dangerous crossing of a red line. “Protest is a right, but violence, trespassing and threatening family members are not part of it,” he said. Levy ordered immediate action to locate, arrest and prosecute those involved. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列警察局长丹尼·利维（Danny Levy）强烈谴责了阿什凯隆军事警察局长住所遭闯入的事件，称这是越过了危险的红线。他说：“抗议是一种权利，但暴力、非法侵入和威胁家庭成员不属于抗议的一部分。”利维下令立即采取行动，定位、逮捕并起诉相关涉案人员。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇺🇸 ✡ Operation Epic baal room Lindsey Graham says they are going introduce legislation that’s going to authorize 400 million dollars to be spent on building the ballroom: We pay for it by offsetting it with customs fees. The sooner we get the ballroom built, the better it is for the country. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench mirror： 🇺🇸 ✡ 史诗巴力厅行动（Operation Epic baal room） 林赛·格雷厄姆（Lindsey Graham）表示，他们将提出立法，授权拨款4亿美元用于建造宴会厅：我们通过抵消关税来支付这笔费用。宴会厅建得越快，对国家就越有利。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Approximately 200 ultra‑Orthodox demonstrators broke into the garden of the IDF Military Police chief’s home in Ashkelon, with some jumping the fence. Brig. Gen. Yuval Yamin was not at home, but his wife and children locked themselves inside. The protest was part of anti‑conscription demonstrations following the arrest of a Haredi draft dodger. IDF Chief of Staff Lt. Gen. Eyal Zamir strongly condemned the attack, saying: “Harm to security personnel and their families constitutes the crossing of a dangerous red line.” Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu demanded “firm action” against those involved, and Defence Minister Katz called the extremists “a group of violent criminals who must be brought to justice with the full severity of the law.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 约200名极端正统派示威者闯入了以色列国防军宪兵司令在阿什凯隆的家中花园，其中一些人翻越了围栏。尤瓦尔·亚明（Yuval Yamin）准将当时不在家，但他的妻子和孩子将自己锁在屋内。此次抗议是针对一名哈雷迪派逃兵被捕后引发的反征兵示威活动的一部分。以色列国防军总参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔（Eyal Zamir）中将强烈谴责了此次袭击，称：“伤害安全人员及其家属构成了越过危险的红线。”以色列总理内塔尼亚胡要求对涉案人员采取“果断行动”，国防部长卡茨称这些极端分子为“一群必须受到法律严惩的暴力罪犯”。 @wfwitness

text: Acting U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Julie Davis is expected to step down soon, reportedly over disagreements with Trump on declining U.S. support for Ukraine. Source: FT
text_zh: 据报道，由于在削减美国对乌克兰支持的问题上与特朗普存在分歧，美国驻乌克兰代理大使朱莉·戴维斯（Julie Davis）预计将很快离职。来源：金融时报（FT）

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine, Julie Davis, will leave her post due to "frustration" with Trump's lack of support for Kiev — FT https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049200042745926118/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 据金融时报（FT）报道，美国驻乌克兰大使朱莉·戴维斯因对特朗普不支持基辅感到“沮丧”而将离职。 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049200042745926118/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israeli UN Ambassador Danny Danon at the Security Council: "It is impossible to talk about peace in Lebanon without mentioning the word Hezbollah. Lebanon will not be able to talk about sovereignty as long as Hezbollah continues to shoot at Israeli citizens and operate without interruption." N12 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列驻联合国大使丹尼·达农（Danny Danon）在安理会上表示：“如果不提及‘真主党’这个词，就不可能谈论黎巴嫩的和平。只要真主党继续向以色列公民开火并肆无忌惮地行动，黎巴嫩就无法谈论主权。” N12 推文

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM: Before the U.S. blockade, about 5 ships were typically moored or anchored at Chabahar Port on a normal day. Now more than 20 vessels are backed up there as U.S. naval pressure disrupts trade moving into and out of Iran. (Some of these vessels carry approximately $200,000,000 worth of oil.) tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 中央司令部：在美国封锁之前，查巴哈尔港（Chabahar Port）平均每天约有5艘船只停泊或锚泊。现在有超过20艘船只滞留在此，因为美国的海军压力扰乱了进出伊朗的贸易。（其中一些船只载有价值约2亿美元的石油。）推文

text: WarTranslated Meanwhile, in Tuapse, rivers of oil are now burning right in the city streets. Local authorities have declared a state of emergency and ordered the evacuation of residents. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049197854325866863/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 与此同时，在图阿普谢（Tuapse），石油河流正在城市街道上燃烧。当地政府已宣布进入紧急状态，并下令疏散居民。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049197854325866863/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Amanda Leigh Fourez is accused of paying thousands of dollars to commission animal torture videos involving adult and baby monkeys for online chat groups. Prosecutors say the so called “animal crush videos” showed monkeys being burned alive and mutilated. (She has nothing to do with Hillary Clinton) tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 阿曼达·利·福雷兹（Amanda Leigh Fourez）被指控支付数千美元，委托在线聊天群组制作涉及成年猴子和幼猴的虐待动物视频。检察官称，这些所谓的“虐杀动物视频”显示猴子被活活烧死和肢解。（她与希拉里·克林顿无关）推文

text: U.S. Central Command Prior to the U.S. blockade on Iran, 5 ships were moored or anchored in the Iranian port of Chah Bahar on an average day. Today, more than 20 vessels remain in Chah Bahar as U.S. forces cut off economic trade going into and coming out of Iran during the ongoing blockade. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2049196477042278844/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 在美国对伊朗实施封锁之前，伊朗查巴哈尔港平均每天有5艘船只停泊或锚泊。今天，由于美国军队在持续封锁期间切断了进出伊朗的经济贸易，超过20艘船只仍滞留在查巴哈尔。 https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2049196477042278844/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: The Chancellor of Germany, Friedrich Merz, thinks it’s OK for Iran to have a Nuclear Weapon. He doesn’t know what he’s talking about! If Iran had a Nuclear Weapon, the whole World would be held hostage. I am doing something with Iran, right now, that other Nations, or Presidents, should have done long ago. No wonder Germany is doing so poorly, both Economically, and otherwise! tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：德国总理弗里德里希·默茨（Friedrich Merz）认为伊朗拥有核武器是可以的。他根本不知道自己在说什么！如果伊朗拥有核武器，全世界都将被扣为人质。我正在对伊朗采取行动，这是其他国家或总统早就应该做的。难怪德国在经济和其他方面表现得如此糟糕！推文

text: WarMonitor Sea shells, really? Trump spent years falsely accusing others of weaponizing the DOJ, only to turn around and use it for revenge against his own political opponents. Former FBI Director James Comey has been indicted again, sources tell @CBSNews @JakeMRosen @SarahNLynch and me. It's connected to the "8647" message he posted of seashells, an apparent reference to 86'ing or getting rid Trump, the 47th president. https://www.cbsnews.com/amp/news/james-comey-under-investigation-posting-deleting-86-47-instagram-noem-says/ - Jennifer Jacobs tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 海贝壳，真的吗？特朗普多年来一直虚假指控他人将司法部武器化，结果自己却转过头来利用司法部对政治对手进行报复。消息人士告诉 @CBSNews @JakeMRosen @SarahNLynch 和我，前联邦调查局局长詹姆斯·科米（James Comey）再次被起诉。这与他发布的关于海贝壳的“8647”信息有关，这显然是指“86”（意为除掉）第47任总统特朗普。 https://www.cbsnews.com/amp/news/james-comey-under-investigation-posting-deleting-86-47-instagram-noem-says/ - 詹妮弗·雅各布斯（Jennifer Jacobs）推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @JavierBlas : 🚨 🚨 🚨 🚨 FULL STATEMENT: UAE says it's leaving the OPEC oil cartel from May 1. "... Following its exit, the UAE will continue to act responsibly, bringing additional production to market in a gradual and measured manner, aligned with demand and market conditions..." https://twitter.com/JavierBlas/status/2049104031495180799/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨（Michael A. Horowitz）转发 @JavierBlas : 🚨 🚨 🚨 🚨 完整声明：阿联酋表示将于5月1日起退出欧佩克（OPEC）石油卡特尔。“……退出后，阿联酋将继续负责任地行事，根据需求和市场状况，以渐进和审慎的方式向市场增加产量……” https://twitter.com/JavierBlas/status/2049104031495180799/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Treasury has sanctioned 35 Iranian entities and individuals for aiding sanctions evasion. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国财政部已制裁35个伊朗实体和个人，理由是他们协助规避制裁。推文

text: WarMonitor This is the kind of thing you expect from third-world dictatorships, not the United States. The State Department is finalizing a plan to redesign U.S. passports to include a photo of President Donald Trump — The Bulwark https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2049183188564545777/photo/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这是你对第三世界独裁政权所预期的那种事情，而不是美国。国务院正在敲定一项计划，将美国护照重新设计，加入唐纳德·特朗普总统的照片 — The Bulwark https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2049183188564545777/photo/1 - 反对特朗普的共和党人推文

text: WarTranslated Russian propagandist Solovyov is screaming at the Russian blogger Victoria Bonya, who currently lives in Monaco, that a real war is going on in Russia and that drone strikes on Russian territory are happening regularly. But wait - is it a war? They were calling it a "smo". https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049192834167623928/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯宣传员索洛维约夫（Solovyov）正在对目前居住在摩纳哥的俄罗斯博主维多利亚·邦亚（Victoria Bonya）大喊大叫，称俄罗斯正在发生真正的战争，且俄罗斯领土正遭受无人机袭击。但等等——这是战争吗？他们之前一直称之为“特别军事行动”（smo）。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049192834167623928/video/1 推文

text: 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 Trump : "My mother had a crush on Charles." (Charles is 2 years younger than trump) 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 特朗普：“我母亲曾迷恋查尔斯。”（查尔斯比特朗普小2岁） 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇦 FT: U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Julie D. Fisher is set to leave her post amid reported differences with President Donald Trump over support for Kyiv. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇦 金融时报（FT）：据报道，由于在支持基辅的问题上与唐纳德·特朗普总统存在分歧，美国驻乌克兰大使朱莉·D·费舍尔（Julie D. Fisher）即将离职。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Central Command states that prior to the U.S. blockade on Iran, an average of five ships were moored or anchored at the Iranian port of Chah Bahar. Today, more than 20 vessels remain there as U.S. forces cut off economic trade entering and leaving Iran during the ongoing blockade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部表示，在美国对伊朗实施封锁之前，平均有五艘船只停泊或锚泊在伊朗恰巴哈尔港。如今，随着美军在持续封锁期间切断了伊朗的进出口贸易，仍有超过20艘船只滞留于此。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇴 UKMTO reports that a tanker 500 nautical miles east of Mogadishu, Somalia, was approached by a Pirate Action Group. A large wooden mothership crossed ahead of the vessel at one nautical mile, then two additional small craft closed to within 400 metres from the starboard side. Armed sentries on the tanker caused the crafts to turn away. Authorities are investigating. Vessels are advised to transit with caution. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇴 英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）报告称，一艘位于索马里摩加迪沙以东500海里的油轮遭到海盗行动小组的接近。一艘大型木制母船在距离该油轮一海里处横穿其船头，随后两艘小型船只从右舷靠近至400米范围内。油轮上的武装警卫迫使这些船只转向离开。当局正在进行调查。建议船只谨慎通行。 @wfwitness

text: 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: 🇺🇸 ✡ Operation Epic baal room Lindsey Graham says they are going introduce legislation that’s going to authorize 400 million dollars to be spent on building the ballroom: We pay for it by offsetting it with customs fees. The sooner we get the ballroom built, the better it is for the country. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ✡ “史诗巴力厅”行动：林赛·格雷厄姆表示，他们将提出立法，授权拨款4亿美元用于建造宴会厅：我们通过关税收入来抵消这笔费用。宴会厅建得越快，对国家就越有利。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇩🇪🇺🇸🇮🇷 German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said Iran’s leadership is “humiliating” the United States in the ongoing conflict. “The Iranians are clearly stronger than expected and the Americans clearly have no truly convincing strategy in the negotiations…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇩🇪 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump attacked German Chancellor Merz, accusing him of thinking it’s ok for Iran to have a nuclear weapon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇩🇪🇺🇸🇮🇷 德国总理弗里德里希·默茨表示，伊朗领导层在当前的冲突中正在‘羞辱’美国。‘伊朗人显然比预期的更强大，而美国人在谈判中显然没有真正令人信服的策略……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇩🇪 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普抨击德国总理默茨，指责他认为伊朗拥有核武器是可以接受的。 @wfwitness
